Home�Services�Executive Security� Digital Privacy
Privacy Services

Digital Privacy
Protection

Your personal information is widely available across data brokers, people-search sites, and public records databases. Our practice systematically identifies and removes personal data exposure � reducing the attack surface available to threat actors, stalkers, and social engineers.

Taking Control of Your Digital Footprint

Data brokers aggregate and sell personal information including home addresses, phone numbers, email addresses, family member names, property records, and financial data. This information is routinely used by cybercriminals for social engineering, spear phishing, and physical security threats against executives and their families.

Our digital privacy service conducts a comprehensive audit of your personal data exposure across hundreds of data sources, initiates removal requests through appropriate legal and technical channels, and establishes ongoing monitoring to prevent re-aggregation of your information.

Capabilities

  • Personal data exposure audit across 200+ data brokers and sources
  • Automated and manual opt-out request submission and tracking
  • People-search site removal (Spokeo, WhitePages, BeenVerified, etc.)
  • Social media privacy audit and configuration hardening
  • Public records exposure assessment
  • Ongoing monitoring for data re-aggregation
  • Executive family member privacy protection
  • Digital footprint report with remediation tracking
  • Annual privacy reassessment and maintenance

Who We Serve

C-suite executives seeking to reduce personal data exposure. High-net-worth individuals and family offices concerned about physical and digital safety. Individuals facing harassment, stalking, or doxxing threats. Public figures seeking to minimize personal information availability.

Privacy Services

  • Data Broker Removal
  • Social Media Hardening
  • Public Records Audit
  • Ongoing Monitoring
  • Family Protection
  • Footprint Reports

Privacy Audit

Request a digital footprint assessment to understand your exposure.

Request Audit
